rulings.Case Title: CR NORTHBAY, INC. VS. YEFIM SKOMOROVSKY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF CR NORTHBAY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Stay Of Proceedings continued to January 17, 2018 per stipulation and order. Parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN A. LEVENTINI VS. MEAGAN MIELKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Meagan Mielke Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Second Cause Of Action Of Plaintiffs John A Leventini And Heather A Leventini First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT MEAGAN MIELKE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Second Cause Of Action Of First Amended Complaint continued to January 8, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than December 22, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL CHIANG VS. MICHAEL ROLLINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 22, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL ROLLINS and HEIDY ROLLINS's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify whether the basis for the UD includes breach of the agreement (e.g. no cooking) or is solely for non-payment of rent; and to allege that the rent demanded in the Notice accrued within 1 year. = (501/REQ)
